description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL-js that analyzes JavaScript code. The workflow runs on pushes to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled cron job. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permissions for security events. The workflow checks out the repository, initializes CodeQL tools, performs CodeQL analysis, uploads results as a build artifact, filters SARIF results, and uploads the filtered SARIF file.
